topStories.description: The strike - which killed at least 168 people, mostly children - "evoked a visceral horror", Volker Türk said.

topStories.title: 2026 Tamil Nadu Assembly election will be a close battle, says P. Chidambaram
topStories.description: Congress leader P. Chidambaram says 2026 Tamil Nadu Assembly election will not be one sided like 2024 Lok Sabha polls; rules out inevitability of coalition government

topStories.title: Yemenis fear economic consequences of being dragged into US-Iran conflict
topStories.description: Iran-allied Houthis yet to get involved in conflict, but could target shipping in Red Sea.

dailyNews.title: US-based burger chain awarded  ₹15 crore in bonuses to employees under pressure
dailyNews.description: The demand was so high that several outlets suffered severe shortages and were even compelled to close early. Despite these challenges, employees managed long queues and handled the intense pressure well.

dailyNews.description: While the equity markets slipped, oil prices continues to edge higher. The benchmark, Brent Crude futures, advanced 3.2% to more than $111 a barrel.

dailyNews.description: The US president's commitment to deadlines is fluid but he uses them for a purpose, writes the BBC's James Landale.

dailyNews.description: The meeting reviewed the 'close strategic cooperation' between Doha and Washington, Qatar's foreign ministry said.

dailyNews.description: Ali Vaez says the US and Iran have reached a stalemate where further escalation would likely lead to catastrophe.

dailyNews.title: BBC journalist caught in travel chaos at Houston Airport
dailyNews.description: The airport is experiencing some of the longest delays in the US as TSA agents work without pay in a partial shutdown.

dailyNews.description: Mexico's navy launches a rescue mission for ships delivering aid to Cuba, strained by food and fuel shortages amid a US embargo.

dailyNews.description: The US television presenter will return to hosting her NBC News programme in April.

dailyNews.title: DarkSword leak puts millions of iPhone users at risk
dailyNews.description: A leaked hacking tool called DarkSword could expose older iPhones and iPads to attacks through malicious links and compromised websites.

dailyNews.title: George Clooney and Natalie Portman lead Hollywood exodus to France to escape ‘pressure cooker’: experts
dailyNews.description: Celebrity exodus to France continues as Hollywood stars trade industry pressure for French culture, privacy and better quality of life for their families, according to experts.

dailyNews.title: Indicted Democrat Rep Sheila Cherfilus-McCormick one step closer to expulsion
dailyNews.description: A House Ethics panel found Rep. Sheila Cherfilus-McCormick guilty of 25 violations while the Florida Democrat is facing possible expulsion and federal charges.

dailyNews.title: Reporter's Notebook: The hitchhiker's guide to what's next to end the DHS shutdown
dailyNews.description: The Senate passed a DHS funding deal by voice vote, but the House faces uncertain math.

dailyNews.title: Trey Kaufman-Renn's controversial tip-in gives Boilermakers spot in Elite Eight, ends Texas' Cinderella story
dailyNews.description: Trey Kaufman-Renn's tip-in with 0.7 seconds left gave Purdue a 79-77 Sweet 16 win over Texas, though debate sparked over a potential foul on the play.

dailyNews.title: DOJ probes California, Maine over transgender inmate housing policies
dailyNews.description: Federal officials are probing whether transgender inmate housing policies in California and Maine violate female inmates' constitutional protections.

dailyNews.title: Scorsese reframes Jesus’ story through the Virgin Mary in ‘The Saints’ special
dailyNews.description: Academy Award-winning filmmaker Martin Scorsese explores the Virgin Mary's story of faith and sacrifice in a new Easter special episode of "The Saints."

dailyNews.title: Airport lines are out-of-control. Trump can save us from TSA insanity — forever
dailyNews.description: Atlanta airport passengers waited five hours in TSA lines while Orlando's privatized security averaged 30 minutes, making the case for ending the government monopoly.

dailyNews.title: Former Dolton, Illinois 'super mayor' pushes for federal troops in Chicago after father shot in neck
dailyNews.description: Former Dolton Mayor Tiffany Henyard urged Illinois Gov. Pritzker and Chicago Mayor Johnson to accept federal assistance after her father was shot in the neck.

dailyNews.title: Couple ditches corporate grind as cost-of-living crisis leads to decade-long van travel
dailyNews.description: A couple from the U.K. learned surprising budget lessons after leaving high-stress corporate jobs. They slashed living expenses and began traveling in a motorhome.

dailyNews.title: 5 simple tech tips to take back control of your social media
dailyNews.description: Social media apps track users' clicks, contacts and location. These five privacy tips can help limit data collection on iPhone and Android.

topStories.description: President Trump is poised to be the first sitting president to have his signature appear on the U.S. dollar.

dailyNews.description: Thousands of demonstrations against the Trump administration are scheduled to take place in cities and towns across the country on Saturday.

dailyNews.title: Iran halts 3 ships in Strait of Hormuz, rejects Trump's diplomacy claims
dailyNews.description: As Trump again postpones his ultimatum to Iran and claims talks are "going very well," Tehran says he's lying and blocks 3 ships in the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: U.S. takes action after Free Press report on South African refugees
dailyNews.description: The Free Press' Madeleine Rowley reported on the living conditions that South African refugees were facing after being brought to the U.S. by the Trump administration. Now, the government is moving to help them.

dailyNews.title: Man jailed for attacking woman after Barron Trump alerted police
dailyNews.description: Matvei Rumiantsev was sentenced for the attack which was witnessed on a video call by President Trump's youngest son.

dailyNews.title: Pressure mounts on Trump to end Iran war
dailyNews.description: President Trump insists that Iran wants to negotiate an end to the war as global pressures mount for the conflict to end. CBS News' Ed O'Keefe and Ramy Inocencio report.

dailyNews.title: Latest news on Iran war as Trump extends Strait of Hormuz deadline and world awaits next moves
dailyNews.description: President Trump announced an extension to his deadline for Iran to open the Strait of Hormuz as he insists that diplomatic efforts are working. Meanwhile, Iran is pushing back on Mr. Trump's rhetoric. CBS News' Aaron Navarro and Holly Williams report.

dailyNews.title: Trump Delays Strikes on Iran's Energy Sector for 10 More Days
dailyNews.description: After nearly one month of war, the United States, Israel and Iran are continuing to trade air and drone strikes. Now President Donald Trump says they’re also trading potential peace plans but Iran is continuing to publicly dispute that any talks are underway. It comes as the president is extending a deadline he gave Iran to open the Strait of Hormuz of face attacks against its power plants. NBC’s Garrett Haake reports for TODAY from the White House.

dailyNews.title: Ambitious, authoritarian and talking to Trump? The hard-liners rising in Iran
dailyNews.description: The Israeli military has systematically killed Iran’s top leaders, so when President Donald Trump said this week that talks are being held with Iran, the biggest question was: Who exactly is the U.S. talking to

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.
